title: Era do Panado II
description: A modpack with the quest for the mega weapon
body:

---

### ✨ What the Pack Features


<details>
<summary>⚔️ RPG, Classes & Combat</summary>

- A complete overhaul of combat, transforming Minecraft into a skill-based action RPG.  

- Swing, dodge, and chain combos thanks to **Better Combat** and **Combat Roll**.  

- Huge variety of weapons and armor, from **Simply Swords** to **Souls-like Weaponry** and **Armor of the Ages**.  

- Play as Wizards, Paladins, Rogues, Archers, Berserkers, or Elemental Wizards, with deep class and magic systems from **Spell Engine** and **Spell Power**.  

- Progression through **Simply Skills** and **Puffish Skills**, with rings, capes, and jewelry adding meaningful bonuses via **Trinkets and Accessories**.

</details>


<details>
<summary>🌍 World Generation, Structures & Dimensions</summary>

- Explore beautifully revamped biomes with **Regions Unexplored** and **Geophilic**.  

- Hundreds of dungeons, mineshafts, strongholds, temples, towns, and towers scattered across the world, thanks to **YUNG’s Better**, **Moog’s Structures**, **Repurposed Structures**, and **Towns and Towers**.  

- Step into unique dimensions like **The Aether**, **Twilight Forest**, **MineCells**, **Bumblezone**, and enhanced versions of the **End** and **Nether**.

</details>


<details>
<summary>⚙️ Technology & Storage</summary>

- Automation and contraptions thrive in the **Create** ecosystem, with expansions like **Steam 'n' Rails**, **Ore Excavation**, **Connected**, and **Create Addition**.  

- Store everything efficiently with **Tom’s Simple Storage**, reinforced chests, barrels, shulker boxes, and **Easy Shulker Boxes**.

</details>


<details>
<summary>🏡 Food, Farming & Decor</summary>

- A rich farming and cooking experience with **Let’s Do Vinery**, **Bakery**, **Brewery**, and **Beachparty**.  

- Automated crops and trees with **Let’s Do Meadow**, **Farm & Charm**, and **Botany Pots**.  

- Build cozy, detailed spaces with **Let’s Do Furniture**, **Candlelight**, **Beautify**, and **Fetzis Asian Deco**.

</details>


<details>
<summary>🐾 Mobs, Enemies & Factions</summary>

- Wildlife and creatures make the world feel alive with **Naturalist**, **Critters & Companions**, **Flowery Mooblooms**, and respawning animals.  

- Face Illager enemies and organized factions through **Illager Invasion**, **Takes a Pillage**, **Illager Warships**, and **Illager Arena**.  

- Guard Villagers assist in defending settlements.  

- Dangerous monsters include biome-specific creepers and zombie variants.

</details>


<details>
<summary>👹 Boss Challenges: Test Your Might</summary>

- Each realm has formidable bosses with unique mechanics.  

- Fight the **Night Lich**, **Mega Spud**, and many more epic titans.  

- Defeating them grants rare loot and crucial components for the **Panado Ritual** and the **Mega Panado Sword**.

</details>


<details>
<summary>✨ Quality of Life & Immersion</summary>

- New methods of travel and navigation.  

- Interactions are smoother with **Right Click Harvest**, **Vein Mining**, and **Construction Wand**.  

- Enhanced visuals, animations, and sounds.

</details>

---
